misc.text: 🚨 BREAKING: José Mourinho back to Real Madrid, HERE WE GO! 💣🤍 All terms have been verbally agreed between José Mourinho and Real Madrid, waiting to sign all documents. Plan for initial two year deal, JM to travel to Madrid after Real-Bilbao game. The Special One is back.

misc.title: 🙏To all art fans around the world HELP😭 I'm Japanese traditional analog artist. I survive on commissions from clients in countries other than Japan. Recently, the situation on Twitter has worsened,
misc.text: 🙏To all art fans around the world HELP😭 I'm Japanese traditional analog artist. I survive on commissions from clients in countries other than Japan. Recently, the situation on Twitter has worsened, and the impressions on my posts have -90％plummeted... my traditional commissioned art life at risk...🥶 if you see this tweet, please commission me. 🤗 The commission pricing details will be included in the ALT section of this post. For more detailed pricing, please send me a direct message. Let's discuss it further. Thank you everyone.🙏🙏🙏

misc.title: This confirms it. Because Sarada is posing as the Volume number 6 and Kawaki as the Volume number 7, Ikemoto foreskins that KawaSara will be the Canon ship at the end of the series (6 7) #BORUTO | RAI
misc.text: This confirms it. Because Sarada is posing as the Volume number 6 and Kawaki as the Volume number 7, Ikemoto foreskins that KawaSara will be the Canon ship at the end of the series (6 7) #BORUTO | RAIDEN (@BorutoRiden) Wait... Ikemoto is actually a genius for this. 🤯 I just realized the characters are posing as the volume numbers. #boruto — https://nitter.net/BorutoRiden/status/2056316828218188105#m
